name: AYJNISHD – DEO, Accountant and More – 26 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 DEO, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech & Hearing Disabilities (AYJNISHD) has notified 26 vacancies for Reader-1 post, Rehabilitation Officer -1 post, Lecturer -2 posts, Social Welfare Officer -2 posts, Accountant -1 post, DEO -1 post and other posts for eligible Graduate and Post Graduate candidates with relevant experience, and interested candidates can submit offline applications between April 2026 and 29-05-2026 at www.ayjnishd.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Consolidated Salary of Rs.60,000/- per month.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 6 to 11 and Consolidated Salary

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AYJNISHD DEO, Accountant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech & Hearing Disabilities Reader (Speech Pathology) Group -A
